title: cardamine californica proles integrifolia
intro: Cardamine californica proles integrifolia, also known as California bittercress, is a subspecies of the Cardamine californica plant, a flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cardamine californica proles integrifolia include reducing swelling and pain, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
